prompt: A majestic black panther with glossy obsidian fur and piercing glowing yellow eyes, crouched aggressively on a thick branch of an ancient gnarled tree that is shaped like a giant human head in profile. The tree trunk forms the neck and jaw, branches create the nose and mouth. Below the panther, a large brown owl with detailed feathers and intense eyes perches on a lower branch, looking up at the panther. Both animals have subtle glowing golden highlights on their bodies. Dramatic fantasy scene at twilight, soft pastel sky with pink and blue hues, misty mountains in the background, rocky foreground. Highly detailed, cinematic lighting, realistic textures, epic and mysterious atmosphere, digital painting style.
